mapper.select: SELECT * FROM standard_documents WHERE document_type = #{documentType} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY published_at DESC, updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM standard_documents WHERE related_standard_document_id = #{relatedStandardDocumentId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY published_at DESC, updated_at DESC
SELECT * FROM standard_documents WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY category ASC, published_at DESC
SELECT * FROM standard_documents WHERE status IN #{s} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO standard_documents (title, document_type, status, version, pending_review_record_id, summary, related_standard_document_id, software_type_id, category, software, software_version, standard_version, code, content, rendered_content, previous_content, stored_file_name, original_file_name, review_comment, submitted_at, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, published_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{documentType}, #{status}, #{version}, #{pendingReviewRecordId}, #{summary}, #{relatedStandardDocumentId}, #{softwareTypeId}, #{category}, #{software}, #{softwareVersion}, #{standardVersion}, #{code}, #{content}, #{renderedContent}, #{previousContent}, #{storedFileName}, #{originalFileName}, #{reviewComment}, #{submittedAt}, #{reviewedAt}, #{reviewedBy}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE standard_documents SET title=#{title}, document_type=#{documentType}, status=#{status}, version=#{version}, pending_review_record_id=#{pendingReviewRecordId}, summary=#{summary}, related_standard_document_id=#{relatedStandardDocumentId}, software_type_id=#{softwareTypeId}, category=#{category}, software=#{software}, software_version=#{softwareVersion}, standard_version=#{standardVersion}, code=#{code}, content=#{content}, rendered_content=#{renderedContent}, previous_content=#{previousContent}, stored_file_name=#{storedFileName}, original_file_name=#{originalFileName}, review_comment=#{reviewComment}, submitted_at=#{submittedAt}, reviewed_at=#{reviewedAt}, reviewed_by=#{reviewedBy}, published_at=#{publishedAt}, updated_at=#{updatedAt} WHERE id=#{id}
